source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Expressive product headings paired with durable sans-serif interface text, plus Japanese typography guidance for social dashboards, profile panels, command search, state labels, and scan-friendly tables.
layout: Layered social surfaces, petal-like grouped panels, 8px component radii, soft cream backgrounds, rose-pink primary actions, stem-green status accents, and calm dashboard/data structure.

prompts.label: Transparent carnation motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Carnation transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a complete carnation ruffle motif for a design-system catalog, isolated on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A single lush carnation bloom with many layered rose-pink ruffled petals, soft blush gradients, warm cream-highlighted petal edges, subtle natural veining, a stem-green calyx, and a short green stem. All petals must remain within rose pink, blush pink, warm coral pink, and cream tones. Botanical accuracy, crisp petal contours, tactile velvety texture, clean studio lighting.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding on all sides; no cropping, no environment, no props.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ffff chroma-key background for background removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ffff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no vase, no bouquet, no hand, no soil, no landscape, no decorative background, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection, no second flower, no black petals, no gray petals, no purple petals, no blue petals, no high-contrast dark interiors.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Carnation light-mode design-system board, regenerated for higher source resolution
Input images: Use the visible transparent carnation motif and the visible first light board as references. Preserve the same system identity, but render a cleaner, larger, less crowded 16:9 board.
Primary request: Regenerate one comprehensive light-mode shadcn/tweakcn-compatible design-system board named Morphous Carnation, derived from rose-pink carnation ruffles, warm cream petal highlights, stem-green accents, and a layered social/product UI mood.
Canvas and resolution: strict 16:9 landscape composition, target 3840 x 2160 pixels, 4K-class source image. Keep all labels large and readable at gallery preview scale; reduce density instead of using tiny text.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Carnation", motif story "Carnation Ruffle", Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Asset Examples.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, social activity feed, layered profile panels, sidebar navigation, top navigation, metrics, relationship chart, moderation/data dashboard, forms, table rows, command palette, search field, empty/loading/error/success states, spacing scale, radius samples, border samples, shadow samples, semantic token swatches.
Theme language: show shadcn/tweakcn CSS-variable roles as readable token chips: background, foreground, card, popover, primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive, border, input, ring, chart-1 through chart-5, sidebar tokens, radius. Surfaces should feel like layered carnation petals: soft cream base, blush-pink cards, rose primary actions, coral focus, stem-green success/accent, deep petal-ink text.
Typography: English product UI guidance plus Japanese typography examples using short readable labels: 見出し, 本文, 状態, 検索.
Style: premium practical product UI, precise grid, 8px-radius card language, layered but not decorative, social system with feeds, people, groups, activity, and data tools. Motif-derived rose-pink, stem-green, and cream palette must dominate without becoming one-note.
Constraints: no generic purple/blue gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no stock landing-page hero, no random brand names, no unreadable microtext, no watermark, no misspelling of Morphous Carnation.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Carnation dark-mode design-system board
Input images: Use the visible transparent carnation motif and the visible Morphous Carnation light board as references. Preserve the same system identity, layout language, palette roles, components, and social/product UI coverage, but translate it into dark mode.
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode shadcn/tweakcn-compatible design-system board named Morphous Carnation. It must feel like the light board translated to dark mode, not a separate theme.
Canvas and resolution: strict 16:9 landscape composition, target 3840 x 2160 pixels, 4K-class source image. Keep labels large and readable at gallery preview scale; avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Carnation", "Dark Mode", motif story "Carnation Ruffle", Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Asset Examples.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, social activity feed, layered profile panels, sidebar navigation, top navigation, metrics, relationship chart, moderation/data dashboard, forms, table rows, command palette, search field, empty/loading/error/success states, spacing scale, radius samples, border samples, shadow samples, semantic token swatches.
Theme language: show shadcn/tweakcn CSS-variable roles as readable token chips: background, foreground, card, popover, primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive, border, input, ring, chart-1 through chart-5, sidebar tokens, radius. Use deep petal-plum and green-black backgrounds, cream foreground text, rose-pink primary actions, coral focus/ring, soft blush surfaces, and stem-green success accents. Surfaces should still feel layered like carnation petals.
Typography: English product UI guidance plus Japanese typography examples using short readable labels: 見出し, 本文, 状態, 検索.
Style: premium practical product UI, precise grid, restrained 8px-radius card language, layered social system with feeds, people, groups, activity, and data tools. Dark mode should be readable and calm, with motif-derived rose pink, stem green, cream, and dark petal ink.
Constraints: no neon colors, no generic pure-black dashboard, no generic purple/blue gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no stock landing-page hero, no random brand names, no unreadable microtext, no watermark, no misspelling of Morphous Carnation.
